entry.title: New IDC DJJ08C1657 awarded to BEARINGPOINT, INC for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:majorProgramCode: PROFESSIONAL ASSISTANCE CONTRACTS TO PROVIDE PROFESSIONAL INVESTIGATIVE AND ANALYTICAL SERVICES
ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: PROFESSIONAL, INVESTIGATIVE, AND TECHNICAL SUPPORT FOR DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE, ASSET FORFEITURE MANAGEMENT PROGRAM.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: ADMINISTRATIVE MANAGEMENT AND GENERAL MANAGEMENT CONSULTING SERVICES

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
